originalTitle: Cruise passengers tell of life on board ship stranded off Cape Verde after hantavirus outbreak
title: Cruise passengers tell of life on board ship stranded off Cape Verde after hantavirus outbreak
content: While passengers onboard the MV Hondius say the situation is calm, they face days at sea as officials warn the disease may have spread.

originalTitle: Orphaned baby hippo to be hand-reared by keepers at Kenya sanctuary
title: Orphaned baby hippo to be hand-reared by keepers at Kenya sanctuary
content: The baby hippo, which has been named Bumpy, was found clinging to its lifeless mother at a lake.

originalTitle: Police officer tells of operation to retrieve human remains from crocodile
title: Police officer tells of operation to retrieve human remains from crocodile
content: DNA tests are underway to confirm whether remains found inside the crocodile match that of a missing man.

originalTitle: Russia cuts mobile internet in Moscow citing drone security concerns
title: Russia cuts mobile internet in Moscow citing drone security concerns
content: Russia has begun rolling mobile internet shutdowns in Moscow and other cities.

originalTitle: Al-Qaeda-linked fighters storm Mali prison, block food supplies to Bamako
title: Al-Qaeda-linked fighters storm Mali prison, block food supplies to Bamako
content: Fighters attack 'Africa's Alcatraz', which detains high-value prisoners, and disrupt crucial supply chains to capital.

originalTitle: Infected passengers evacuated from hantavirus cruise ship
title: Infected passengers evacuated from hantavirus cruise ship
content: Three passengers have been evacuated from a cruise ship off the coast of Cape Verde after an outbreak of hantavirus.

originalTitle: Oil prices drop and stock markets rise after reports of deal to end Iran war
title: Oil prices drop and stock markets rise after reports of deal to end Iran war
content: Reports have raised hopes of an agreement between the US and Iran after days of escalation.

originalTitle: Ted Turner, media mogul who revolutionised TV news by launching CNN, dies at 87
title: Ted Turner, media mogul who revolutionised TV news by launching CNN, dies at 87
content: The media mogul pioneered the modern 24-hour news culture when he launched the Cable News Network in 1980.

originalTitle: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
content: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.

originalTitle: Inside Man City's WSL title-winning season
title: Inside Man City's WSL title-winning season
content: Manchester City have won a first Women's Super League title in 10 years - but how did they achieve it?

originalTitle: Saka the hero as Arsenal reach first Champions League final in 20 years
title: Saka the hero as Arsenal reach first Champions League final in 20 years
content: Bukayo Saka scores the only goal of the game to send Arsenal back to the Champions League final for the first time since 2006, as Mikel Arteta's side see off Atletico Madrid 1-0 at the Emirates Stadium.

originalTitle: Why was Neves handball against Bayern not a penalty?
title: Why was Neves handball against Bayern not a penalty?
content: Bayern Munich players, coaching staff and fans at the Allianz Arena were in disbelief after they were denied a penalty for a handball by Joao Neves in their semi-final second leg against Paris St-Germain.
